description: Style NoteRevel in the comfort of soft fabric with this red Elance modern trunk brief from jockey. The superior fabric provides breathable comfort, while the cut offers easy leg movement. The printed label allows abrasion free comfort and the double layered fly construction offers maximum supportProduct DetailsModern trunk is designed to Fit excellentlyContoured pouch design for maximum comfort and supportUnique leg treatment that eliminates the fabric from ridng upNew ultra soft waistband provides super soft, smooth and comfortable gripMaterial and Care100% premium combed cotton with rib fabricMachine wash delicate at 40 degrees with like colours using a mild detergentDo not bleach, iron or dry cleanTumble dry low
